test_cases.description: Urban journalism podcast/newsletter — Frequency — architecture and city focus, serious editorial register
test_cases.input_summary: Clear editorial personality (precise, contrarian), named references (Dezeen, Iwan Baan, Monocle), anti-references (smart-city marketing), four platforms specified
test_cases.output_summary: Visual identity statement is specific and not interchangeable with another project; six dimensions in prose; Iwan Baan reference is precise ('occupation-first' approach named explicitly); 'what this is not' names three specific failure modes; master AI prompt string is functional; asset guide covers 4 formats with specific notes per format

test_cases.description: Personal finance podcast — warm, accessible, not corporate — no named references from user
test_cases.input_summary: Audience is financial non-experts, warm and accessible tone required, strong anti-reference to avoid (stuffy financial media, aggressive fintech), no named references from user
test_cases.output_summary: Skill generates reference suggestions autonomously (Morning Brew aesthetic for digital warmth, specific personal finance publications); identity statement distinguishes 'warm and trustworthy' from 'dumbed down'; master prompt string avoids stock-photo financial imagery

test_cases.description: Horror anthology fiction podcast — dark, literary, adult — print horror fiction magazine reference
test_cases.input_summary: Horror genre, literary quality (not pulp), adult audience, print-adjacent aesthetic, specific constraint (no gore, psychological not visceral horror)
test_cases.output_summary: Visual identity correctly positions in literary horror (Shirley Jackson territory) rather than graphic horror; references cite Weird Tales era illustration and horror literary fiction covers; 'what this is not' explicitly excludes both gore aesthetics and teen-horror tropes; motion/animation dimension notes that horror uses stillness not jump-cut editing

notes: The most comprehensive skill in the art-direction category. Actionability is the weakest dimension because the output is a brief rather than a produced asset — implementation requires a designer. The six-dimension structure in prose is the key quality signal: it elevates this above a checklist to something a creative collaborator can actually work from.
